mapper.select: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(report_date, '%Y-%m') AS month, COUNT(*) AS report_count FROM reports GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(report_date, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY month
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(r.report_date, '%Y-%m') AS month, COUNT(p.id) AS paper_count FROM papers p LEFT JOIN reports r ON p.report_id = r.id GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(r.report_date, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY month
SELECT student_name, COUNT(*) AS report_count FROM reports GROUP BY student_name ORDER BY report_count DESC
SELECT r.student_name, COUNT(p.id) AS paper_count FROM papers p LEFT JOIN reports r ON p.report_id = r.id GROUP BY r.student_name ORDER BY paper_count DESC
